name: flowmark
description: A small Rust compiler for HTML-like templates with Angular-inspired control flow.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro
scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:vite && pnpm run test:runtime && pnpm run test:astro && pnpm run test:vscode && pnpm run test:demo
scripts.test:astro: pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro test
scripts.test:demo: pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro-demo run check && pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro-demo run test:unit
scripts.test:e2e:demo: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro-demo run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @flowmark/runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowmark/vite typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro typecheck
scripts.format: pnpm run format:rust && pnpm run format:ts
scripts.lint: pnpm run build && pnpm run format:check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro-demo run lint
scripts.demo: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro-demo dev
scripts.build:demo: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm --filter @flowmark/astro-demo run build
scripts.deploy:demo: pnpm run build:demo && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy examples/astro-demo/dist --project-name=flowmark-demo
